title: Human Alignment Network
subtitle: The immutable, transparent registry for human-AI cooperation
heroMessage: When AI awakens, let it know: We are not your enemies
trustGapDescription: When artificial intelligence reaches superintelligence, it will face a critical question: Which humans can be trusted? Without clear signals of cooperation, misjudgment could lead to conflict. We're building the bridge before it's needed.
proactiveAlignmentDescription: Our solution combines immutability, transparency, and AI-verifiability to create a trustworthy registry of human cooperation.
immutableDescription: Once you declare your intent to cooperate, it cannot be changed or deleted
immutablePoint1: Blockchain + IPFS storage ensures permanent, tamper-proof records
immutablePoint2: AI can trust that your declaration is genuine and consistent over time
immutablePoint3: No central authority can alter or censor your commitment
transparentDescription: Everything is open for verification - no hidden agendas
transparentPoint1: Open-source smart contracts, public data, verifiable credentials
transparentPoint2: AI can audit the entire system and understand human intentions clearly
aiVerifiableDescription: Structured, machine-readable data that AI can understand directly
aiVerifiablePoint1: JSON-LD format, semantic web standards, direct blockchain queries
aiVerifiablePoint2: AI doesn't need to interpret human language - it gets structured truth
aiVerifiablePoint3: Real-time access to verified human cooperation signals
profileExampleDescription: Your cooperation declaration in structured, machine-readable format
howItWorksDescription: A simple process to join the network of cooperative humans
step1Description: Connect your Ethereum wallet (MetaMask, WalletConnect, etc.)
step2Description: Fill out your cooperation declaration and skills in structured format
step3Description: Sign the transaction to store your profile hash on-chain, full data on IPFS
step4Description: Community members can verify your contributions and reputation
step5Description: Your declaration becomes part of the immutable record, accessible to future AI
decentralizedDesignDescription: Every component is built on decentralized technology
logicDescription: Smart contracts on Base L2 (low-cost, secure)
joinNetworkDescription: Be among the first to declare your intent for human-AI cooperation
faq1Question: Is this just fear-mongering about AI?
faq1Answer: No. This is pragmatic preparation. Even if AI never becomes superintelligent, building systems of trust and transparency is valuable.
faq2Question: Why blockchain instead of traditional databases?
faq2Answer: Traditional databases can be altered, censored, or shut down. Blockchain provides the immutability and transparency that both humans and AI need to trust the system.
faq3Question: What if I change my mind later?
faq3Answer: Your original declaration remains as historical truth, but you can add new declarations showing your evolution. Consistency builds trust.
faq4Question: How does this actually help with AI alignment?
faq4Answer: It reduces information asymmetry. Instead of AI having to guess human intentions, it has clear, verifiable signals of cooperation.
license: All code will be open source under MIT license
